response.justification: Candidate is a skilled senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role demands a Principal/Director-level IC with 15+ years and recognized AI expertise. Bogdan has roughly 13-14 years of professional experience, no demonstrated AI products or platforms, only recent and light exposure to AI-agent tooling at re:cinq, and no track record of strategic advisory work with cloud/AI customers at the scale this role requires.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infra
Founder of GISCollective shows entrepreneurial and platform-building drive
Recent hands-on work with MCP and agentic developer tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
Experience level and scope below Principal/Director IC bar (no strategy or exec advisory track record)
No advanced degree in AI and limited cloud-platform strategic depth

key_factors.factor: Seniority and strategic scope gap vs. Principal IC bar
